creator: jan.stephan.dd@gmail.com
text:
devel/gobject-introspection fails to build against lang/python27 due to missing headers. Python27 (v2.7.6_4) was built with the following options:

[ ] EXAMPLES
[X] FPECTL
[X] IPV6
[X] NLS
[X] PTH
[ ] PYMALLOC
[ ] SEM
[X] THREADS

( ) UCS2
(*) UCS4

How-To-Repeat: 1) Build lang/python27 with the options mentioned above.
2) Switch to devel/gobject-introspection
3) make install
